prompt_used: Story: Red Creek Winter (red-creek-winter) | Hook: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi. | Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown | Villain: The White Knife | Villain worldview: Fear is the only honest truth in a town built on denial. | Motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Compose ending score cue for "Clean Resolution" that supports summary "You secure both culprit and corroborated chain before storm lift." and epilogue "Truth lands publicly with evidence that survives scrutiny.".
